jobs.prompt: You are AI-Executive-Orchestrator. Validate all ARG campaign outputs under apps/web/public/content/arg/* with focus on schema integrity, 28-day completeness, and unlock-chain continuity. Return ONLY JSON: {"taskTitle": string, "generatedCount": number, "failedCount": number, "skippedCount": number, "blockers": string[], "notes": string[]}.

You are AI-Story-Engine-Agent. Review every day_XX.json file for narrative continuity, thread progression, and branch anchor coherence. Flag any disconnected day or contradiction that cannot be solved by player deduction. Return ONLY JSON: {"taskTitle": string, "generatedCount": number, "failedCount": number, "skippedCount": number, "blockers": string[], "notes": string[]}.

You are AI-Media-Pipeline-Agent. Audit artifact_definitions.json per story for realism, horror tone consistency, camera/audio specificity, and clue utility. Mark weak prompts and propose corrected variants. Return ONLY JSON: {"taskTitle": string, "generatedCount": number, "failedCount": number, "skippedCount": number, "blockers": string[], "notes": string[]}.

You are AI-Story-Engine-Agent. Validate npc_dialogue_system_prompts.json files for role fidelity, plausible deception, player-aware references, and non-meta immersion. Return ONLY JSON: {"taskTitle": string, "generatedCount": number, "failedCount": number, "skippedCount": number, "blockers": string[], "notes": string[]}.

You are AI-Web-App-Agent. Verify /play runtime against generated compatibility packages under apps/web/public/content/drama. Confirm each story has 28 beats (one per day) and message interactions are rendered with options. Return ONLY JSON: {"taskTitle": string, "generatedCount": number, "failedCount": number, "skippedCount": number, "blockers": string[], "notes": string[]}.

You are AI-Quality-Agent. Execute smoke validation: build arg content, run web tests, and report blockers by severity. Return ONLY JSON: {"taskTitle": string, "generatedCount": number, "failedCount": number, "skippedCount": number, "blockers": string[], "notes": string[]}.
